==Biography==
Chronos started playing League of Legends in the middle of season 2 at the age of 14. He was Diamond by the end of season 3 and began try harding. For three seasons was he an AD Carry main, but in the middle of season 6 he changed to Jungle and really began try harding for a professional career. He played with amateur team BX3 from Norway in the start, but quickly some pro teams found out about him.
He got picked up by [[The G-Lab Penguins]] and started his professional gaming career there. 

== Trivia ==
* Was a {{ci|Rek'Sai}} one-trick until partway through Season 6.
* Looks up to [[Bengi]], [[Ambition]], and [[Blank (Kang Sun-gu)|Blank]] because of their supportive jungling style, high game knowledge, and macro play.
